'''âr-v-v''' ('''ravava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tiffin|tiffin]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-v-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tiffin|tiffin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-v-v
|-
! Lemma
| ravava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ravavithi|ravavithi]] || [[word:ravaviji|ravaviji]] || [[word:ravavishi|ravavishi]] || [[word:ravavi|ravavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ravavuthuth|ravavuthuth]] || [[word:ravavujuj|ravavujuj]] || [[word:ravavushush|ravavushush]] || [[word:ravav|ravav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ravavuthu|ravavuthu]] || [[word:ravavuju|ravavuju]] || [[word:ravavushu|ravavushu]] || [[word:ravavu|ravavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ravavufuth|ravavufuth]] || [[word:ravavufuj|ravavufuj]] || [[word:ravavufush|ravavufush]] || [[word:ravavuf|ravavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ravavethe|ravavethe]] || [[word:ravaveje|ravaveje]] || [[word:ravaveshe|ravaveshe]] || [[word:ravave|ravave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ravavothoth|ravavothoth]] || [[word:ravavojoj|ravavojoj]] || [[word:ravavoshosh|ravavoshosh]] || [[word:ravav|ravav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ravavotho|ravavotho]] || [[word:ravavojo|ravavojo]] || [[word:ravavosho|ravavosho]] || [[word:ravavo|ravavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ravavofoth|ravavofoth]] || [[word:ravavofoj|ravavofoj]] || [[word:ravavofosh|ravavofosh]] || [[word:ravavof|ravavof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ravavĂŠthĂŠ|ravavĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ravavĂŠjĂŠ|ravavĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ravavĂŠshĂŠ|ravavĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ravavĂŠ|ravavĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ravavathath|ravavathath]] || [[word:ravavajaj|ravavajaj]] || [[word:ravavashash|ravavashash]] || [[word:ravav|ravav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ravavatha|ravavatha]] || [[word:ravavaja|ravavaja]] || [[word:ravavasha|ravavasha]] || [[word:ravava|ravava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ravavafath|ravavafath]] || [[word:ravavafaj|ravavafaj]] || [[word:ravavafash|ravavafash]] || [[word:ravavaf|ravavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ravavasha|ravavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goravavasha|goravavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiravavasha|gokiravavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ravavnĂŒsha|ravavnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goravavnknĂŒsha|goravavnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiravavnĂŒsha|gokiravavnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ravavshĂ«sha|ravavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goravavnkshĂ«sha|goravavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiravavshĂ«sha|gokiravavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ravavrosha|ravavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goravavnkrosha|goravavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiravavrosha|gokiravavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ravavmusha|ravavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goravavnkmusha|goravavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiravavmusha|gokiravavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ravavsherasha|ravavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goravavnksherasha|goravavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiravavsherasha|gokiravavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ravavngasha|ravavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goravavnkngasha|goravavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiravavngasha|gokiravavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ravavyasha|ravavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goravavnkyasha|goravavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiravavyasha|gokiravavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ravavyamasha|ravavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goravavnkyamasha|goravavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiravavyamasha|gokiravavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ravavnĂŒshĂ«sha|ravavnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goravavnknĂŒshĂ«sha|goravavnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiravavnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiravavnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ravavnĂŒrosha|ravavnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goravavnknĂŒrosha|goravavnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiravavnĂŒrosha|gokiravavnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ravavnĂŒmusha|ravavnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goravavnknĂŒmusha|goravavnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiravavnĂŒmusha|gokiravavnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ravavshĂ«nĂŒsha|ravavshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goravavnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goravavnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiravavshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiravavshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ravavshĂ«rosha|ravavshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goravavnkshĂ«rosha|goravavnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiravavshĂ«rosha|gokiravavshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ravavshĂ«musha|ravavshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goravavnkshĂ«musha|goravavnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiravavshĂ«musha|gokiravavshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ravavronĂŒsha|ravavronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goravavnkronĂŒsha|goravavnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiravavronĂŒsha|gokiravavronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ravavroshĂ«sha|ravavroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goravavnkroshĂ«sha|goravavnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiravavroshĂ«sha|gokiravavroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ravavromusha|ravavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goravavnkromusha|goravavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiravavromusha|gokiravavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ravavmunĂŒsha|ravavmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goravavnkmunĂŒsha|goravavnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiravavmunĂŒsha|gokiravavmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ravavmushĂ«sha|ravavmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goravavnkmushĂ«sha|goravavnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiravavmushĂ«sha|gokiravavmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ravavmurosha|ravavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goravavnkmurosha|goravavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiravavmurosha|gokiravavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ravav|ravav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:rĂŠvĂŠv|rĂŠvĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:horavav|horavav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:horĂŠvĂŠv|horĂŠvĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoravav|hohoravav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorĂŠvĂŠv|hohorĂŠvĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒravav|nĂŒravav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒrĂŠvĂŠv|nĂŒrĂŠvĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒravav|nĂŒnĂŒravav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠvĂŠv|nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠvĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻravav|nĂŻravav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻrĂŠvĂŠv|nĂŻrĂŠvĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻravav|nĂŻnĂŻravav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠvĂŠv|nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠvĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luravav|luravav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lurĂŠvĂŠv|lurĂŠvĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluravav|luluravav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurĂŠvĂŠv|lulurĂŠvĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liravav|liravav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lirĂŠvĂŠv|lirĂŠvĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliravav|liliravav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirĂŠvĂŠv|lilirĂŠvĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koravav|koravav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:korĂŠvĂŠv|korĂŠvĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoravav|kokoravav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorĂŠvĂŠv|kokorĂŠvĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keravav|keravav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kerĂŠvĂŠv|kerĂŠvĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeravav|kekeravav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerĂŠvĂŠv|kekerĂŠvĂŠv]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
